description: Build an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes the Cassini mission SQLite database (cassini.db) for querying by Claude Code and Claude Desktop. TypeScript + Bun, using bun:sqlite for the database driver and @modelcontextprotocol/sdk for the MCP protocol. The server lives in a new mcp/ directory with its own package.json, separate from loop/.

tasks.title: Create mcp/src/db.ts — SQLite helper module
tasks.description:
Create the mcp/ package directory with package.json (dependencies: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod; no better-sqlite3 — use bun:sqlite which is built-in), tsconfig.json, and src/db.ts.

The db.ts module provides three functions:
- openDb(dbPath: string) — opens the SQLite database in read-only mode using bun:sqlite's Database class. Use path.resolve() to handle relative paths.
- getSchema(db) — queries sqlite_master for tables, then PRAGMA table_info for each table. Returns a formatted string showing table names, column names, types, PK/NOT NULL flags.
- query(db, sql) — executes a read-only SQL query. Before executing, validates the SQL doesn't match a write pattern (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, ALTER, CREATE, REPLACE, TRUNCATE, ATTACH, DETACH, REINDEX, VACUUM, PRAGMA with =). Returns JSON string of { rows } with results. Caps output at 100 rows — if more exist, truncates and adds a note.

The database is cassini.db in the project root. It has two tables:
- master_plan (~61,873 rows): id, start_time_utc, duration, date, team, spass_type, target, request_name, library_definition, title, description
- planets (6 rows): id, name, type, parent_body, distance_from_sun_km, orbital_period_days, radius_km, mass_kg, discovered_date, discoverer, notes

IMPORTANT: Use `import { Database } from 'bun:sqlite'` — do NOT use better-sqlite3, it doesn't work with Bun.
acceptanceCriteria: mcp/package.json exists with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and zod as dependencies (NOT better-sqlite3)
mcp/tsconfig.json exists with appropriate TypeScript config
mcp/src/db.ts exports openDb, getSchema, and query functions
openDb opens the database in read-only mode using bun:sqlite
query rejects write statements with an error
query caps results at 100 rows with a truncation note

tasks.title: Create mcp/src/index.ts — MCP server with query, schema, tables tools
tasks.description:
Create the MCP server entry point at mcp/src/index.ts using the McpServer API from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js and StdioServerTransport from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js.

The server exposes 3 tools:

1. 'query' — Execute a read-only SQL query. Input: { sql: z.string() }. Uses the query() function from db.ts. Returns JSON rows. Catches errors and returns them with isError: true.

2. 'schema' — Get database schema. No input. Uses getSchema() from db.ts. Returns formatted text.

3. 'tables' — List all tables with row counts. No input. Queries sqlite_master for table names, then SELECT COUNT(*) for each. Returns formatted text like 'master_plan: 61873 rows'.

All tools wrap their logic in try/catch and return { content: [{ type: 'text', text }] } on success or { content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Error: ...' }], isError: true } on failure.

The database path comes from DATABASE_PATH env var, defaulting to './cassini.db'.

Server setup:
```
const server = new McpServer({ name: 'cassini', version: '1.0.0' })
// register tools...
const transport = new StdioServerTransport()
await server.connect(transport)
```

IMPORTANT: Import from db.ts using './db.js' extension (ESM resolution). The server must work when run via `bun run mcp/src/index.ts` from the project root.
acceptanceCriteria: query tool accepts { sql: string } and returns JSON rows
schema tool returns formatted table/column info
tables tool returns table names with row counts
All tools have error handling with isError flag

Running 'echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0.0"}}}' | bun run mcp/src/index.ts' returns a valid JSON-RPC response

tasks.title: Create .mcp.json for Claude Code auto-discovery
acceptanceCriteria: .mcp.json exists in project root with correct cassini server config
The command in .mcp.json is 'bun' with args ['run', 'mcp/src/index.ts']
DATABASE_PATH env var is set to './cassini.db'
